findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: The first visible heading in the PDF ('DWQ January 2012 Civil Penalty Assessments') is not represented as a heading element in the HTML. It only appears as a <caption> inside the table, which is structurally equivalent to a paragraph demotion.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'DWQ January 2012 Civil Penalty Assessments' is the largest, boldest text at the top of page 1, functioning as the document title. HTML: This text appears only as <caption>DWQ January 2012 Civil Penalty Assessments</caption> within the <table>; no <h1> or other heading element carries this title.
